title: Lex Alliance expands operations with new office in New Delhi
description: Lex Alliance has announced the opening of its new office in New Delhi, marking a significant milestone in the firm’s growth and operational evolution.Located at R-24, R Block, South Extension Part II, New Delhi – 110049, the new office spans approximately 7,200 sq. ft. and brings together the Firm’s earlier Defence Colony offices into a single, significantly expanded workspace.Snapshot from the new officeThe new facility has been designed with a clear focus on capability and performance. Eq
